data.current_summary: Retrieve a list of all free-to-play games
data.current_description: Returns a list of all available free-to-play games. Optionally filter by category, platform, or sort results.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all available free-to-play games from the database. Supports optional filtering by category and platform, and sorting by various criteria. Returns an array of GameSummary objects containing game title, genre, description, developer, publisher, release date, and thumbnail image. No authentication required.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions filtering and sorting capabilities but lacks specificity about which parameters are available, what the response contains, and the structure of returned data. message: Operation 'getGameById' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. data.current_summary: Return details from a specific game by ID
data.current_description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific free-to-play game by its ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific free-to-play game using its unique game ID. Returns a GameDetail object containing full game information including title, genre, description, developer, publisher, release date, official website, platform availability, and system requirements. No authentication required. Returns an error response if the game ID is not found.

data.current_description: Filter games by multiple tags for personalized results.

Supports combining multiple tags for refined searches. No authentication required.
